---
title: "Upgrading spatial analysis of Origin-Destination data using modern vis frameworks, part 1 of 2"
date: 2018-07-06
description: "Spatially arranged Beziers and OD-matrices in ggplot2."
title-block-banner: "#32251f"

categories:
  - data visualization
  - spatial analysis
  - ggplot2

image: map_map.png
twitter-card: 
    image: "map_map.png"
open-graph: 
    image: "map_map.png"

format:
  html:
    shift-heading-level-by: 1
---

```{=html}
<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=https://medium.com/@roger.beecham.231/upgrading-spatial-analysis-of-origin-destination-data-using-modern-vis-frameworks-part-1-of-2-ee1c6481a595">
<script>
  window.location.replace("https://medium.com/@roger.beecham.231/upgrading-spatial-analysis-of-origin-destination-data-using-modern-vis-frameworks-part-1-of-2-ee1c6481a595");
</script>
<p>Redirecting to the Medium post. If you are not redirected, <a href="https://medium.com/@roger.beecham.231/upgrading-spatial-analysis-of-origin-destination-data-using-modern-vis-frameworks-part-1-of-2-ee1c6481a595">click here</a>.</p>
```
